---
title: "Sealos Auth API 引导"
description: "使用账号密码获取 Global Token，并换取 Region Token、App Token 和 kubeconfig。"
---

### Step 1: 账号密码登录，获取 Global Token

请求：

```bash
curl -s -X POST 'https://<sealos-domain>/api/auth/password' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "user": "admin",
    "password": "8f4c75cexxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxefa675df"
  }'

```

响应：

```json
{
  "code": 200,
  "message": "Successfully",
  "data": {
    "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyVWlkIjoiZDI4ZDZjODQtOTk0My00NjU1LTg1ZTgtYTg5MDhjODg2MjMyIiwidXNlcklkIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzM5ODY5OTAsImV4cCI6MTc3Mzk4NzA1MH0.uzrTVQ8SizKtRPclTlFBgsVBY9eOEdT3Sf1clt0TCLc",
    "needInit": false
  }
}
```

0326 更新

Body 

user 字段没有字符限制
password

      1\. 长度至少 8 个字符

      2\. 不能全是空白字符，必须至少包含一个非空白字符

用户未注册情况，支持自动注册用户、并初始化可用区信息

### Step 2: 用 Global Token 换取 Region Token (含 kubeconfig)

Authorization header 直接放 token，不需要 "Bearer " 前缀

请求：

```bash
curl -s -X POST 'https://<sealos-domain>/api/auth/regionToken' \
  -H 'Authorization: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyVWlkIjoiZDI4ZDZjODQtOTk0My00NjU1LTg1ZTgtYTg5MDhjODg2MjMyIiwidXNlcklkIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzM5ODY5OTAsImV4cCI6MTc3Mzk4NzA1MH0.uzrTVQ8SizKtRPclTlFBgsVBY9eOEdT3Sf1clt0TCLc'

```

响应：

```json
{
  "code": 200,
  "message": "Successfully",
  "data": {
    "kubeconfig": "apiVersion: v1\nclusters:\n- cluster:\n    certificate-authority-data: \n    server: https://192.168.10.70.nip.io:6443\n  name: sealos\ncontexts:\n- context:\n    cluster: sealos\n    namespace: ns-admin\n    user: admin\n  name: admin@sealos\ncurrent-context: admin@sealos\nkind: Config\npreferences: {}\nusers:\n- name: admin\n  user:\n    token: eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6InhJNHhrVE9NTHVJbDk1WVg5WGRhR2Z6Sy1LZ1hldXdLV0R6TnloMXFzdGcifQ..GubcyKafDG7vgBCeYbxjEAtoGTMJw0KkCTk1jAWadbIBjv7wI-QFFJtxHp0g9cWDUxg9sAXQBV-HAkRgs1djsqxg5k9kufkO1oKIyA29HLX75jhrnQiQfpOrHU9ugmuc_QWqLD_Ke1AUEIyS3ClKLGFtfTml15W4z6qCTuzr4O3kKp3pfRvlXPPVCwyP9pCOsM0LEQa0FKYGOuacQZo3KyQZMS8DMZhZhO36ZOFCjPlkuW53ZVKQRlhs2HuhFRRs8YY7FF9vHgHaTK669WvB-6ZI6oZ8vSmKrlEx0a0CeAQ4v13vES_b4XGxuiroDFx6ZXwe01pJKMKwmF1ApAIrVw\n",
    "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..mIiv_6Q2q9sBay09Szq9qVyQZsYFV5lPEsTSwuqqItw",
    "appToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..CZXxBayEs5edxBQ2en0Y8XapZ_aQttPL7F32r0fKQ3I"
  }
}
```

* `<sealos-domain>` 替换为实际 Sealos 主域名,比如 [192.168.10.70.nip.io](https://template.192.168.10.70.nip.io/)

* 后续接口使用，**URL 编码**之后的 kc ，作为 Authorization 即可（encodeURIComponent）
